tasks_completed: Copied taxonomy tree from knowledge-system to knowledge-system-jade
Fixed validate_taxonomy() to auto-create missing dirs+files with --repair-all
Fixed validate_dependencies() IMPORT_NAME_MAP for pillow->PIL and python-pptx->pptx
Updated validate_taxonomy() call site in kb_init() to pass repair_all parameter

git_rationale.root_cause_1: validate_taxonomy() had unimplemented repair branch (comment said 'In the future, could add template-based creation') - the else branch only logged an issue but never created files or directories
git_rationale.root_cause_2: dependency check used wrong import names: package.replace('-', '_') produces 'python_pptx' (wrong) and 'pillow' (wrong import name); correct imports are 'pptx' and 'PIL'
git_rationale.root_cause_3: knowledge-system-jade taxonomy was never seeded because it was gitignored in source public repo
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Implemented repair branch with mkdir(parents=True)+write_text for both files and directories; added IMPORT_NAME_MAP dict looked up before falling back to replace('-','_'); also added repair_all parameter to function signature and updated call site

changes_detail.validate_taxonomy_signature: Added repair_all: bool = False parameter to function signature (line 606)
changes_detail.validate_taxonomy_repair_branch: Replaced 'just report' stub with actual dir/file creation logic using path.mkdir(parents=True) and path.write_text() (lines 629-650)
changes_detail.validate_taxonomy_call_site: Updated kb_init() call at line 929 to pass repair_all as 5th positional argument
changes_detail.validate_dependencies_import_map: Added IMPORT_NAME_MAP dict inside loop with pillow->PIL and python-pptx/python_pptx->pptx mappings (lines 835-840)
changes_detail.taxonomy_copy: 14 ISCED subdirectories + 4 root files copied from /root/knowledge-system/knowledge-base/_taxonomy/ to /root/knowledge-system-jade/knowledge-base/_taxonomy/

dev.qa_notes: Run: cd /root/knowledge-system-jade && source venv/bin/activate && python scripts/utilities/kb-init.py --non-interactive --repair-all. Expected: exit 0, no warnings about taxonomy or pillow/pptx dependencies.
